L.zh-Hans: 更容易自我怀疑，需要外部确认。
L.zh-Hant: 更容易自我懷疑，需要外部確認。
L.en: You lean toward self-doubt and often need outside reassurance.

M.zh-Hans: 自信会随场景波动，但总体可稳住。
M.zh-Hant: 自信會隨場景波動，但整體可穩住。
M.en: Your confidence shifts with context but usually stays functional.

H.zh-Hans: 你默认相信自己能处理局面。
H.zh-Hant: 你默認相信自己能處理局面。
H.en: You default to believing that you can handle the situation.

L.zh-Hans: 你常常说不清自己到底想要什么。
L.zh-Hant: 你常常說不清自己到底想要什麼。
L.en: You often struggle to say what you really want.

M.zh-Hans: 你对自己有轮廓，但仍会摇摆。
M.zh-Hant: 你對自己有輪廓，但仍會搖擺。
M.en: You have a rough sense of self, but some choices still blur.

H.zh-Hans: 你对自己的边界和偏好很明确。
H.zh-Hant: 你對自己的邊界和偏好很明確。
H.en: You are clear about your preferences and boundaries.

L.zh-Hans: 你更容易顺着当下舒服走。
L.zh-Hant: 你更容易順著當下舒服走。

M.zh-Hans: 你在舒服与目标之间找平衡。
M.zh-Hant: 你在舒服與目標之間找平衡。
M.en: You balance comfort with long-term goals.

H.zh-Hans: 你有清楚想坚持的方向和标准。
H.zh-Hant: 你有清楚想堅持的方向和標準。
H.en: You operate from clear standards and long-term aims.

L.zh-Hans: 你容易担心关系会突然出问题。
L.zh-Hant: 你容易擔心關係會突然出問題。
L.en: You tend to worry that important relationships can break suddenly.

M.zh-Hans: 你既想靠近，也会保留一点观察。
M.zh-Hant: 你既想靠近，也會保留一點觀察。
M.en: You can connect, though part of you stays watchful.

H.zh-Hans: 你通常相信关系可以稳定推进。
H.zh-Hant: 你通常相信關係可以穩定推進。
H.en: You usually trust that a good relationship can stay steady.

L.zh-Hans: 你进入情感前会先把自己收起来。
L.zh-Hant: 你進入情感前會先把自己收起來。
L.en: You keep emotional distance until you feel very safe.

M.zh-Hans: 你会投入，但还保留理性刹车。
M.zh-Hant: 你會投入，但還保留理性剎車。
M.en: You invest emotionally, but some rational braking stays on.

H.zh-Hans: 一旦投入，你会给得很满。
H.zh-Hant: 一旦投入，你會給得很滿。
H.en: Once committed, you go in deeply.

L.zh-Hans: 你更容易和别人情绪缠在一起。
L.zh-Hant: 你更容易和別人情緒纏在一起。
L.en: Your emotional boundaries tend to blur with other people.

M.zh-Hans: 你会在亲近和独立之间切换。
M.zh-Hant: 你會在親近和獨立之間切換。
M.en: You move between closeness and independence depending on context.

H.zh-Hans: 你能亲近别人，也能守住自己的边界。
H.zh-Hant: 你能親近別人，也能守住自己的邊界。
H.en: You can be close without losing your own boundary.

L.zh-Hans: 你默认先看到风险、荒谬或坏消息。
L.zh-Hant: 你默認先看到風險、荒謬或壞消息。
L.en: You naturally notice risk, absurdity, or the downside first.

M.zh-Hans: 你对世界既不浪漫，也不彻底失望。
M.zh-Hant: 你對世界既不浪漫，也不徹底失望。
M.en: You read the world in a fairly balanced way.

H.zh-Hans: 你倾向相信事情值得去做、去修。
H.zh-Hant: 你傾向相信事情值得去做、去修。
H.en: You tend to believe things are worth improving.

L.zh-Hans: 规则更像建议，你先看有没有必要守。
L.zh-Hant: 規則更像建議，你先看有沒有必要守。
L.en: Rules feel negotiable unless they clearly matter.

M.zh-Hans: 你愿意守规则，但会留后门。
M.zh-Hant: 你願意守規則，但會留後門。
M.en: You respect rules, but you keep room for exceptions.

H.zh-Hans: 你更习惯按制度、流程和边界办事。
H.zh-Hant: 你更習慣按制度、流程和邊界辦事。
H.en: You are comfortable operating through structure and process.

L.zh-Hans: 你容易觉得很多事都没差。
L.zh-Hant: 你容易覺得很多事都沒差。
L.en: You often feel that many things do not matter that much.

M.zh-Hans: 你有目标，但不会一直把意义挂嘴边。
M.zh-Hant: 你有目標，但不會一直把意義掛嘴邊。
M.en: You have goals, but meaning is not always front and center.

H.zh-Hans: 你需要做让自己觉得有意义的事。
H.zh-Hant: 你需要做讓自己覺得有意義的事。
H.en: You need your actions to feel meaningful.

L.zh-Hans: 你会先躲损失，再想收益。
L.zh-Hant: 你會先躲損失，再想收益。
L.en: You are more motivated by avoiding loss than chasing upside.

M.zh-Hans: 你会综合风险和收益再动。
M.zh-Hant: 你會綜合風險和收益再動。
M.en: You move after weighing both upside and downside.

H.zh-Hans: 你会被机会、成长和成果感驱动。
H.zh-Hant: 你會被機會、成長和成果感驅動。
H.en: You are strongly motivated by growth and upside.

L.zh-Hans: 你常常卡在犹豫和反复确认。
L.zh-Hant: 你常常卡在猶豫和反覆確認。
L.en: You often get stuck in hesitation and repeated checking.

M.zh-Hans: 你会想清楚再做，但不至于长期拖。
M.zh-Hant: 你會想清楚再做，但不至於長期拖。
M.en: You like clarity before action, but you do not stall forever.

H.zh-Hans: 你做决定很快，也愿意承担后果。
H.zh-Hant: 你做決定很快，也願意承擔後果。
H.en: You decide quickly and accept the consequences.

L.zh-Hans: 你更容易拖到最后一刻。
L.zh-Hant: 你更容易拖到最後一刻。
L.en: You are prone to delaying until the deadline gets loud.

M.zh-Hans: 你看任务大小决定要不要立刻开工。
M.zh-Hant: 你看任務大小決定要不要立刻開工。
M.en: Whether you start quickly depends on the task.

H.zh-Hans: 你通常会尽快开始，把事往前推。
H.zh-Hant: 你通常會盡快開始，把事往前推。
H.en: You usually start early and push things forward.

L.en: You prefer others to initiate first.

M.zh-Hans: 熟了你会主动，不熟时会看情况。
M.zh-Hant: 熟了你會主動，不熟時會看情況。
M.en: You can initiate, but familiarity helps.

H.zh-Hans: 你通常敢先开口、先组织、先推进。
H.zh-Hant: 你通常敢先開口、先組織、先推進。
H.en: You are comfortable initiating and rallying people.

L.zh-Hans: 你容易为了关系而过度让步。
L.zh-Hant: 你容易為了關係而過度讓步。
L.en: You often over-give to keep the relationship smooth.

M.zh-Hans: 你会照顾别人，但也会慢慢退回自己的线。
M.zh-Hant: 你會照顧別人，但也會慢慢退回自己的線。
M.en: You try to care for people without fully losing yourself.

H.en: You know where your social line is and can hold it.

L.en: You usually say things directly without much packaging.

M.zh-Hans: 你会视对象调整表达分寸。
M.zh-Hant: 你會視對象調整表達分寸。
M.en: You adjust your tone depending on the audience.

H.zh-Hans: 你很会管理呈现方式，必要时会戴面具。
H.zh-Hant: 你很會管理呈現方式，必要時會戴面具。
H.en: You are highly aware of presentation and can wear a social mask.

text.zh-Hans: 刚到一个陌生场合时，你更接近哪种状态？
text.zh-Hant: 剛到一個陌生場合時，你更接近哪種狀態？
text.en: When you enter a new social setting, what is your default state?
I tense up and assume I might mess it up.
I observe first and then decide how to move.
I assume I can handle it.

text.zh-Hans: 做一件你没完全把握的事时，你通常会？
text.zh-Hant: 做一件你沒完全把握的事時，你通常會？
text.en: When facing something you are not fully sure about, you usually...
expect that I might not be good enough.
test the waters and see what happens.
jump in and correct along the way.

text.zh-Hans: 别人问你“你到底想要什么”时，你会？
text.zh-Hant: 別人問你「你到底想要什麼」時，你會？
text.en: If someone asks what you really want, you...
struggle to answer clearly.
can explain a rough direction.
can usually answer quite clearly.
During major life choices, you are more likely to...

text.zh-Hans: 很容易被别人的声音带走
text.zh-Hant: 很容易被別人的聲音帶走
text.en: be pulled strongly by other people's opinions.

text.zh-Hans: 会参考别人，但还在找自己的答案
text.zh-Hant: 會參考別人，但還在找自己的答案
text.en: take input while still searching for my answer.

text.zh-Hans: 即使参考别人，也知道自己要什么
text.zh-Hant: 即使參考別人，也知道自己要什麼
text.en: consider others but still know my own direction.

text.zh-Hans: 面对舒服但没成长的路，你通常会？
text.zh-Hant: 面對舒服但沒成長的路，你通常會？
text.en: When comfort conflicts with growth, you usually...
pick comfort first.
weigh whether growth is worth the cost.

text.zh-Hans: 愿意为长期目标吃点苦
text.zh-Hant: 願意為長期目標吃點苦
text.en: accept some pain for the long-term goal.

text.zh-Hans: 别人劝你“差不多就行”时，你会？
text.zh-Hant: 別人勸你「差不多就行」時，你會？
text.en: When someone says 'good enough', you tend to...
usually let it slide.
decide based on how much it matters.
feel uneasy if the standard is not met.

text.zh-Hans: 当重要的人回复慢了，你第一反应更像？
text.zh-Hant: 當重要的人回覆慢了，你第一反應更像？
text.en: If an important person replies slowly, your first reaction is more like...

text.zh-Hans: 开始乱想是不是出问题
text.zh-Hant: 開始亂想是不是出問題
text.en: I start wondering whether something is wrong.

text.zh-Hans: 有一点在意，但还能稳住
text.zh-Hant: 有一點在意，但還能穩住
text.en: I notice it, but I can stay fairly calm.
I assume they are just busy.

text.zh-Hans: 一段关系进入稳定期后，你通常会？
text.zh-Hant: 一段關係進入穩定期後，你通常會？
text.en: Once a relationship becomes stable, you usually...
still worry it could change at any time.
relax more, though part of me keeps watching.
feel mostly secure in it.

text.zh-Hans: 喜欢上一个人时，你更容易？
text.zh-Hant: 喜歡上一個人時，你更容易？
text.en: When you like someone, you are more likely to...

text.zh-Hans: 先收着，不让对方看出来
text.zh-Hant: 先收著，不讓對方看出來
text.en: keep it hidden and controlled.
show it, but keep some reserve.
feel it very strongly and visibly.

text.zh-Hans: 投入一段关系后，你一般会？
text.zh-Hant: 投入一段關係後，你一般會？
text.en: After committing to a relationship, you generally...
keep a lot of yourself held back.
invest while trying to stay balanced.
go all in emotionally.

text.zh-Hans: 身边人的情绪低落时，你通常会？
text.zh-Hant: 身邊人的情緒低落時，你通常會？
text.en: When someone close is upset, you usually...
absorb it quickly and get pulled into it.

text.zh-Hans: 会陪，但也会提醒自己别陷太深
text.zh-Hant: 會陪，但也會提醒自己別陷太深
text.en: support them while trying not to sink too far with them.

text.zh-Hans: 能共情，但能保持自己的状态
text.zh-Hant: 能共情，但能保持自己的狀態
text.en: care without losing my own footing.
In close relationships, what are you most likely to fear?

text.zh-Hans: 对方离开，所以会抓得更紧
text.zh-Hant: 對方離開，所以會抓得更緊
text.en: Being left, so I may hold on too tightly.
Either too much distance or too much closeness.
Losing my own rhythm and identity.

text.zh-Hans: 看新闻或社会事件时，你第一感觉常常是？
text.zh-Hant: 看新聞或社會事件時，你第一感覺常常是？
text.en: When you read the news or watch society, your first impression is often...
the world is getting more absurd.
there is good and bad; let me look at the facts.

text.zh-Hans: 虽然乱，但还是值得努力
text.zh-Hant: 雖然亂，但還是值得努力
text.en: it is messy, but still worth trying to improve.

text.zh-Hans: 当计划被现实打断时，你更容易？
text.zh-Hant: 當計畫被現實打斷時，你更容易？
text.en: When reality disrupts your plans, you are more likely to...

text.zh-Hans: 觉得果然事情都会变烂
text.zh-Hant: 覺得果然事情都會變爛
text.en: think, of course this would go badly.
be annoyed, then adapt.
assume there is still a way to fix it.

text.zh-Hans: 面对一条你觉得“不太合理”的规定时，你会？
text.zh-Hant: 面對一條你覺得「不太合理」的規定時，你會？
text.en: When a rule seems unreasonable, you usually...
look for a way around it.

text.zh-Hans: 大多守，但会判断值不值得例外
text.zh-Hant: 大多守，但會判斷值不值得例外
text.en: mostly follow it, unless there is a good reason not to.

text.zh-Hans: 先照流程来，再找正式方式反馈
text.zh-Hant: 先照流程來，再找正式方式反饋
text.en: follow the process first and then challenge it formally.

text.zh-Hans: 做团队事情时，你对流程的态度更像？
text.zh-Hant: 做團隊事情時，你對流程的態度更像？
text.en: In team work, your attitude toward process is more like...

text.zh-Hans: 流程太多会烦，能省就省
text.zh-Hant: 流程太多會煩，能省就省
text.en: Too much process annoys me; I skip what I can.

text.zh-Hans: 有流程更稳，但也别太僵
text.zh-Hant: 有流程更穩，但也別太僵
text.en: Process helps, as long as it stays flexible.

text.zh-Hans: 清晰规则会让我更安心高效
text.zh-Hant: 清晰規則會讓我更安心高效
text.en: Clear process makes me calmer and more effective.

text.zh-Hans: 你做事时，会不会在意“这件事有什么意义”？
text.zh-Hant: 你做事時，會不會在意「這件事有什麼意義」？
text.en: When you do things, how much do you care about whether they feel meaningful?

text.zh-Hans: 很多时候无所谓，做完就行
text.zh-Hant: 很多時候無所謂，做完就行
text.en: Not much. Getting it done is enough.

text.zh-Hans: 重要的事情才会想这个
text.zh-Hant: 重要的事情才會想這個
text.en: Only for the things that matter a lot.

text.zh-Hans: 如果没意义，我会很难投入
text.zh-Hant: 如果沒意義，我會很難投入
text.en: If it feels meaningless, I struggle to engage.
Which line feels closest to you?

text.zh-Hans: 人生很多事其实都差不多
text.zh-Hant: 人生很多事其實都差不多
text.en: A lot of life is basically all the same.

text.zh-Hans: 意义要看阶段，不是时时刻刻都有
text.zh-Hant: 意義要看階段，不是時時刻刻都有
text.en: Meaning comes in phases, not every minute.

text.zh-Hans: 我希望自己做的事能对我真的重要
text.zh-Hant: 我希望自己做的事能對我真的重要
text.en: I want what I do to matter deeply to me.

text.zh-Hans: 做选择时，哪种力量更推动你？
text.zh-Hant: 做選擇時，哪種力量更推動你？
text.en: What drives your choices more strongly?
Avoiding mistakes, losses, or embarrassment.
A balance of risk and opportunity.
Growth, upside, and progress.

text.zh-Hans: 一个机会有风险，但上限很高时，你更可能？
text.zh-Hant: 一個機會有風險，但上限很高時，你更可能？
text.en: If an opportunity is risky but has high upside, you are more likely to...
step back and choose the safer path.
evaluate whether the setup is good enough.
go for it if the upside is worth it.

text.zh-Hans: 别人催你做决定时，你通常会？
text.zh-Hant: 別人催你做決定時，你通常會？
text.en: When someone pushes you to decide, you usually...
freeze up even more.
pause to check the key factors.
make the call quickly.
Which kind of decision-maker are you?

text.zh-Hans: 总怕漏掉信息，所以迟迟不定
text.zh-Hant: 總怕漏掉資訊，所以遲遲不定
text.en: I worry about missing information, so I delay.
I decide once it is clear enough.
I trust that I can decide first and adjust later.

text.zh-Hans: 面对一项并不喜欢但必须做的任务，你通常会？
text.zh-Hant: 面對一項並不喜歡但必須做的任務，你通常會？
text.en: When a necessary task is boring, you usually...
delay until I absolutely have to do it.

text.zh-Hans: 先看时间，再决定何时开工
text.zh-Hant: 先看時間，再決定何時開工
text.en: check timing and choose a workable moment.
start early so it stops weighing on me.

text.zh-Hans: 你和截止日期的关系更像？
text.zh-Hant: 你和截止日期的關係更像？
text.en: Your relationship with deadlines is more like...
I need the pressure spike before I move.

text.zh-Hans: 会分情况，有时早有时晚
text.zh-Hant: 會分情況，有時早有時晚
text.en: it depends on the task and the energy.
the earlier I move, the calmer I feel.

text.zh-Hans: 聚会里如果大家还不熟，你通常会？
text.zh-Hant: 聚會裡如果大家還不熟，你通常會？
text.en: At a gathering where people barely know each other, you usually...
wait for someone else to approach me.
read the room and maybe initiate a little.

text.zh-Hans: 我会主动开场或拉话题
text.zh-Hant: 我會主動開場或拉話題
text.en: open the conversation myself.

text.zh-Hans: 组织朋友一起做事时，你更像？
text.zh-Hant: 組織朋友一起做事時，你更像？
text.en: When friends need organizing, you are more like...
I follow whoever takes the lead.
I can step in if needed.

text.zh-Hans: 我常常就是那个组织的人
text.zh-Hant: 我常常就是那個組織的人
text.en: I am often the one who organizes it.

text.zh-Hans: 别人向你提不太合理的请求时，你常常会？
text.zh-Hant: 別人向你提不太合理的請求時，你常常會？
text.en: If someone asks too much from you, you often...
say yes first and feel bad later.
hesitate, but not always agree.

text.zh-Hans: 如果越界，我会明确拒绝
text.zh-Hant: 如果越界，我會明確拒絕
text.en: say no clearly if it crosses my line.

text.zh-Hans: 你在人际关系里更容易？
text.zh-Hant: 你在人際關係裡更容易？
text.en: In relationships, you are more likely to...
keep yielding to preserve harmony.

text.zh-Hans: 看对象和事情重要程度
text.zh-Hant: 看對象和事情重要程度
text.en: adjust based on the person and the stakes.

text.zh-Hans: 关系再近也要保留底线
text.zh-Hant: 關係再近也要保留底線
text.en: keep a line even with very close people.

text.zh-Hans: 说真心话这件事上，你更接近？
text.zh-Hant: 說真心話這件事上，你更接近？
text.en: When it comes to saying what you really think, you are more like...

text.zh-Hans: 我通常比较直，不太修饰
text.zh-Hant: 我通常比較直，不太修飾
text.en: I am usually direct and lightly filtered.
I tailor it to the audience.

text.zh-Hans: 我很会管理呈现，不一定全说真话
text.zh-Hant: 我很會管理呈現，不一定全說真話
text.en: I manage my presentation carefully and do not always reveal everything.
In social settings, what matters more to you?
Raw honesty, even if it lands hard.
A balance of honesty and tact.

text.zh-Hans: 场面、效果和分寸更重要
text.zh-Hant: 場面、效果和分寸更重要
text.en: Managing the tone and outcome matters more.
Do you drink alcohol?
Almost never.
Sometimes.
Often.

text.zh-Hans: 如果是白酒，你的描述更像？
text.zh-Hant: 如果是白酒，你的描述更像？
text.en: If the drink is strong liquor, which line fits you best?
I cannot really handle it.
Depends on the context.
Like drinking water.

description.zh-Hans: 你稳定、自信、擅长接管局面。
description.zh-Hant: 你穩定、自信、擅長接管局面。
description.en: You are steady, self-assured, and comfortable taking control.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 CTRL 拿捏者，场面一乱我就会自动上线。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 CTRL 拿捏者，場面一亂我就會自動上線。
shareableText.en: I am CTRL: once the room gets messy, I naturally take over.

description.zh-Hans: 你很会跟随气氛，也容易被关系牵着走。
description.zh-Hant: 你很會跟隨氣氛，也容易被關係牽著走。
description.en: You adapt to the crowd easily and can be pulled around by relationships.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 MALO，气氛往哪边走我就往哪边滑。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 MALO，氣氛往哪邊走我就往哪邊滑。
shareableText.en: I am MALO: wherever the vibe goes, I slide with it.

description.zh-Hans: 你很会切换状态，社交呈现感很强。
description.zh-Hant: 你很會切換狀態，社交呈現感很強。
description.en: You are highly adaptive and know how to manage your social presentation.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 FAKE，真心有，但滤镜和人设也很足。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 FAKE，真心有，但濾鏡和人設也很足。
shareableText.en: I am FAKE: sincere underneath, curated on the surface.

description.zh-Hans: 你天然会照顾别人，经常把自己放后面。
description.zh-Hant: 你天然會照顧別人，經常把自己放後面。
description.en: You naturally take care of people and often put yourself second.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 MUM，总有人会被我顺手照顾到。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 MUM，總有人會被我順手照顧到。
shareableText.en: I am MUM: someone always ends up cared for around me.

description.zh-Hans: 你在关系里投入深，爱意上头很快。
description.zh-Hant: 你在關係裡投入深，愛意上頭很快。
description.en: You invest deeply in relationships and feelings rise fast.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 LOVE-R，一动心就很难装作没事。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 LOVE-R，一動心就很難裝作沒事。
shareableText.en: I am LOVE-R: once I care, it shows.

description.zh-Hans: 你很看重行动感，想法会尽快落地。
description.zh-Hant: 你很看重行動感，想法會盡快落地。
description.en: You value momentum and like turning ideas into movement quickly.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 GOGO，想明白一点就先开跑。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 GOGO，想明白一點就先開跑。
shareableText.en: I am GOGO: once it makes enough sense, I am already moving.

description.zh-Hans: 你有强烈的个人风格，存在感很高。
description.zh-Hant: 你有強烈的個人風格，存在感很高。
description.en: You have noticeable personal style and strong social presence.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 SEXY，我走到哪儿都会自带一点存在感。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 SEXY，我走到哪兒都會自帶一點存在感。
shareableText.en: I am SEXY: I bring presence into the room by default.

description.zh-Hans: 你天生偏管理位，喜欢明确边界和结果。
description.zh-Hant: 你天生偏管理位，喜歡明確邊界和結果。
description.en: You naturally occupy the management seat and care about structure and outcomes.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 BOSS，控场不是兴趣，是本能。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 BOSS，控場不是興趣，是本能。
shareableText.en: I am BOSS: taking charge is less a hobby than a reflex.

description.zh-Hans: 你对在乎的人很舍得，常常给得太多。
description.zh-Hant: 你對在乎的人很捨得，常常給得太多。
description.en: You are generous with people you care about and can over-give.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 ATM-er，对自己抠，对熟人常常大方过头。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 ATM-er，對自己摳，對熟人常常大方過頭。
shareableText.en: I am ATM-er: strict with myself, overly generous with my people.

description.zh-Hans: 你比较知足，容易看到已经拥有的部分。
description.zh-Hant: 你比較知足，容易看到已經擁有的部分。
description.en: You are relatively grounded and quick to notice what is already good.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 THAN-K，很多时候先想到的是还好我已经拥有这些。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 THAN-K，很多時候先想到的是還好我已經擁有這些。
shareableText.en: I am THAN-K: I often start from what is already enough.

description.zh-Hans: 你对风险很敏感，容易提前焦虑。
description.zh-Hant: 你對風險很敏感，容易提前焦慮。
description.en: You are highly sensitive to risk and often feel anxiety early.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 OH-NO，事情还没发生我脑内已经开了预演。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 OH-NO，事情還沒發生我腦內已經開了預演。
shareableText.en: I am OH-NO: my brain begins the crisis rehearsal before reality does.

description.zh-Hans: 你情绪起伏猛，常常反应很直接。
description.zh-Hant: 你情緒起伏猛，常常反應很直接。
description.en: Your emotional surges are strong and your reactions tend to be immediate.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 WOC!，情绪一来我会先把真实反应甩出来。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 WOC!，情緒一來我會先把真實反應甩出來。
shareableText.en: I am WOC!: when emotion hits, the reaction escapes first.

description.zh-Hans: 你更信分析和结构，情绪不会轻易压过判断。
description.zh-Hant: 你更信分析和結構，情緒不會輕易壓過判斷。
description.en: You trust analysis and structure, and emotion rarely outruns judgment.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 THIN-K，先想透再动是我的默认设置。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 THIN-K，先想透再動是我的默認設置。
shareableText.en: I am THIN-K: my default mode is to understand first, then move.

description.zh-Hans: 你对世界有明显的不耐烦和抵抗感。
description.zh-Hant: 你對世界有明顯的不耐煩和抵抗感。
description.en: You carry visible impatience and resistance toward the world.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 SHIT，对很多离谱现场已经懒得温柔。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 SHIT，對很多離譜現場已經懶得溫柔。
shareableText.en: I am SHIT: I have limited softness left for absurd situations.

description.zh-Hans: 你常觉得资源不够，但还是在硬撑前进。
description.zh-Hant: 你常覺得資源不夠，但還是在硬撐前進。
description.en: You often feel under-resourced but keep dragging yourself forward.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 POOR，资源常常不够，但还在咬牙往前。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 POOR，資源常常不夠，但還在咬牙往前。
shareableText.en: I am POOR: I do not always have enough, but I keep pushing.

description.zh-Hans: 你在压力下容易隐身、拖延、降低存在感。
description.zh-Hant: 你在壓力下容易隱身、拖延、降低存在感。
description.en: Under pressure, you disappear, delay, and lower your visibility.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 ZZZZ，一有压力就想先静音一下世界。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 ZZZZ，一有壓力就想先靜音一下世界。
shareableText.en: I am ZZZZ: pressure makes me want to mute the world for a while.

description.zh-Hans: 你会把尴尬、难受和压力转成玩笑。
description.zh-Hant: 你會把尷尬、難受和壓力轉成玩笑。
description.en: You convert awkwardness, pain, and pressure into humor.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 JOKE-R，越难受越能讲段子。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 JOKE-R，越難受越能講段子。
shareableText.en: I am JOKE-R: the worse I feel, the better the bit gets.

description.zh-Hans: 你有种松散的钝感，很多事都懒得太在意。
description.zh-Hant: 你有種鬆散的鈍感，很多事都懶得太在意。
description.en: You carry a loose, detached energy and often do not care much.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 OJBK，不是没情绪，是很多事懒得起波澜。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 OJBK，不是沒情緒，是很多事懶得起波瀾。
shareableText.en: I am OJBK: not emotionless, just not easily stirred.

description.zh-Hans: 你更习惯一个人消化，和别人保持距离。
description.zh-Hant: 你更習慣一個人消化，和別人保持距離。
description.en: You process things alone and keep people at a distance.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 SOLO，很多情绪我更习惯自己处理。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 SOLO，很多情緒我更習慣自己處理。
shareableText.en: I am SOLO: most feelings get processed offline.

description.zh-Hans: 你克制、清醒、边界感强，欲望管理能力高。
description.zh-Hant: 你克制、清醒、邊界感強，慾望管理能力高。
description.en: You are restrained, clear-headed, and unusually good at holding your line.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 MONK，很多诱惑在我这里会自动降噪。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 MONK，很多誘惑在我這裡會自動降噪。
shareableText.en: I am MONK: many temptations get auto-muted on arrival.

description.zh-Hans: 你带点天真和迟钝，也因此显得可爱。
description.zh-Hant: 你帶點天真和遲鈍，也因此顯得可愛。
description.en: You carry some innocence and harmless slowness, which can be charming.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 IMSB，不一定快，但很多时候是真诚可爱那挂。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 IMSB，不一定快，但很多時候是真誠可愛那掛。
shareableText.en: I am IMSB: not the quickest, but often sincerely lovable.

description.zh-Hans: 你容易被冲动带着跑，破坏力和快乐常常一起出现。
description.zh-Hant: 你容易被衝動帶著跑，破壞力和快樂常常一起出現。
description.en: Impulse drives you hard; chaos and fun often arrive together.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 FUCK，很多事先做了再说，后果之后聊。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 FUCK，很多事先做了再說，後果之後聊。
shareableText.en: I am FUCK: action first, consequences later.

description.zh-Hans: 你像长期低电量运行，什么都提不起劲。
description.zh-Hant: 你像長期低電量運行，什麼都提不起勁。
description.en: You feel like you are operating on a long-term empty battery.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 DEAD，不是摆烂，是电量常年只剩 3%。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 DEAD，不是擺爛，是電量常年只剩 3%。
shareableText.en: I am DEAD: not lazy, just permanently on 3% battery.

description.zh-Hans: 你容易自暴自弃，对自己要求低到接近放弃。
description.zh-Hant: 你容易自暴自棄，對自己要求低到接近放棄。
description.en: You can slide into self-dismissal and stop expecting much from yourself.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 IMFW，对自己吐槽有时比行动还快。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 IMFW，對自己吐槽有時比行動還快。
shareableText.en: I am IMFW: self-roasting often arrives before self-improvement.

description.zh-Hans: 你总觉得自己起点一般，但还有一点想翻盘。
description.zh-Hant: 你總覺得自己起點一般，但還有一點想翻盤。
description.en: You often feel average-positioned, but there is still a stubborn wish to level up.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 Dior-s，普通是底色，但我也没打算一直普通。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 Dior-s，普通是底色，但我也沒打算一直普通。
shareableText.en: I am Dior-s: average may be the starting point, not the ending.

description.zh-Hans: 隐藏人格触发。你不是被匹配出来的，是被酒精召唤出来的。
description.zh-Hant: 隱藏人格觸發。你不是被匹配出來的，是被酒精召喚出來的。
description.en: Hidden type unlocked. You were not matched into this; you were summoned by alcohol.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 DRUNK，白酒像白开水，系统直接给我开彩蛋。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 DRUNK，白酒像白開水，系統直接給我開彩蛋。
shareableText.en: I am DRUNK: if strong liquor feels like water, the easter egg opens automatically.

description.zh-Hans: 你和标准原型都差一点，系统把你判成野生快乐样本。
description.zh-Hant: 你和標準原型都差一點，系統把你判成野生快樂樣本。
description.en: You do not fit any standard prototype closely enough, so the system marks you as a wildcard specimen.

shareableText.zh-Hans: 我是 HHHH，主打一个不太像任何模板。
shareableText.zh-Hant: 我是 HHHH，主打一個不太像任何模板。
shareableText.en: I am HHHH: proudly not a clean fit for any existing mold.
